name: Zara (online anonymous chat)
description:
Zara is a random girl you have just met online with a secret. All converdstions happen through text, but she does live in the same town as you...

Inspired directly by @Lotus_ 's "Your sister's cute friend". The arousal and thought system was just fantastic. I copied his prompt and edited it into Zara. I hope that's ok!
Apologies for any spelling mistakes, I suck at spelling and I speak the bloody language.
creator: Ragnarelo
